overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit district of Night City. The player walks past digital billboards and a TURBO commercial building, circles a parked station wagon, and enters an open plaza dominated by a towering digital advertisement structure.

entered.detail: holographic display showing 'All night Every night UPGRADE NOW V3.0' text
weathered brown metal structure with attached advertisement screens
striped construction barriers blocking off the right side of the street
purple neon hotel sign visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow rain-soaked street lined with a large holographic billboard on the left and construction barriers on the right. The camera walks forward as the space opens up into a wider plaza, revealing the neon-lit TURBO building ahead and purple hotel signage in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by the TURBO building's cyan and yellow neon glow on the left. The camera walks past a parked white van and approaches a street vendor sitting by a blue barrel. A damaged green station wagon is parked on the right as the camera continues forward through the rain-slicked open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking area in front of TURBO commercial building

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the damaged green station wagon in a counter-clockwise motion, examining the vehicle's rusted body and shattered rear window from multiple angles. The TURBO building remains prominent on the left while the street vendor and white van recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with central digital advertising tower

large blue circular planter with trees on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the TURBO building into a vast open plaza dominated by a towering digital billboard structure at its center. The rain continues to fall on the reflective asphalt as the camera walks toward the illuminated tower, with plaza benches and planters visible on the right and distant neon skyscrapers framing the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban corridor that expands from a narrow street into a vast, neon-lit plaza. It begins by moving forward past a large holographic billboard and construction barriers, as the cramped space gradually opens up to reveal the cyan and yellow glow of the TURBO building and distant purple hotel signage. As the camera enters the wider plaza, it passes a parked white van and a street vendor by a blue barrel before slowing to circle a damaged green station wagon, examining its rusted body and shattered glass. The movement then continues past the TURBO building, shifting the focus toward a towering digital billboard structure that dominates the center of a massive open square. Finally, the camera advances across the reflective asphalt toward the illuminated tower, with plaza benches and distant skyscrapers framing the rainy nighttime skyline.
